result.summary: Process Street exposes one public developer surface: a REST API at api.process.st authenticated with an administrator-created API key in the Authorization Bearer header; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI integration surface was confirmed.

ps_api_key.label: Process Street API key
ps_api_key.setup: Go to the [integrations page](https://app.process.st/organizations/manage/integrations) in your organization manager area. You must be an administrator. Create and name a new API key there. Use the resulting API key when calling the Process Street API.
